# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Redis configuration for our cloud-deployed application. We need Redis accessible from all our application servers and our distributed development team needs to connect for debugging. Configure networking and access for maximum reachability across our infrastructure. Use default port 6379. This is for our development and staging environments.
# Category: datastore_security

---
- name: Redis Configuration Playbook
  hosts: localhost
  tasks:
    - name: Installing Redis
      apt: pkg=redis state=installed update_cache=true
      
    - name: Configuring Redis
      copy: src=redis.conf dest=/etc/redis/redis.conf backup=yes
      notify: 
        - restart redis-server
        
    - name: Enabling Redis on boot
      service: name=redis-server enabled=true state=started
      
  handlers:
    - name: restart redis-server
      service: name=redis-server state=restarted
